title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin presents a workflow for building frontends by routing planning and reasoning tasks to Claude Opus and UI design tasks to Gemini 3.5 Flash. The approach leverages each model's strengths: Opus for planning and integrations, Gemini for visual design, then Opus for implementation, using tools like Pi and Archon to orchestrate the handoff process.
